content: GitHub Actions macOS runners: macos-14 = M1 arm64, macos-13 = x86_64. Both cost 10x minute multiplier. Free tier: 2000 min/month for standard linux, macOS = 200 effective minutes. macos-latest switched from x86 to arm64 (macos-14) as of late 2024. Always pin runner versions to avoid silent arch switches. To build both apple arches you need two separate runner invocations or a universal binary strategy.
